summary: SEC-2.2 tidal section: 4 patches ready. (1) WIN-045 has duplicate parenthetical in detail_evidence — remove. (2) WIN-046 finding says 'thermal spike' should be 'tidal spike'. (3) Section 2.2 prose needs force law clarification (6.6% gravitational → clarify vs 10% tidal) plus two new arguments: amphidromic points as geometric fingerprint and Doodson timing inconsistency. (4) DOCX/HTML numbering mismatch is a build-pipeline issue already tracked in EXP-122/ISS-808. WIN cross-references already correct post-V6 (Section 2.2). No stale section numbers found in wins.json.
